## Discussion

Include the [doc://com.apple.fileprovider/documentation/FileProvider/NSFileProviderManager/DisconnectionOptions/temporary] value when the disconnection is temporary, such as when updating the domain. Exclude this value when the disconnection isn’t temporary, like when the user logs out.

# temporary

**Type Property**

A temporary disconnection.

## Declaration

```swift
static var temporary: NSFileProviderManager.DisconnectionOptions { get }
```

## Discussion

Include the [doc://com.apple.fileprovider/documentation/FileProvider/NSFileProviderManager/DisconnectionOptions/temporary] value when the disconnection is temporary, such as when updating the domain. Exclude this value when the disconnection isn’t temporary, like when the user logs out.
title: temporary
